title: torreyochloa pallida var. natans
intro: Torreyochloa pallida var. natans, also known as floating needlegrass or water needlegrass, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Torreyochloa pallida var. natans include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in water, and it can also be used as a tea or added to salves and ointments for topical application.
